caribbean.headline: Caribbean Winds Rise
caribbean.paragraph: Roatan is experiencing 27 kt winds with 5.9 ft wave heights and a 38% rain probability, while St. Lucia has relatively calm conditions with 12 kt winds. I expect the Western Caribbean to bear the brunt of the weather today, with Roatan being the top impact port due to the higher wind speeds and wave heights.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Winds Rise
mediterranean.paragraph: Mykonos is experiencing 21 kt winds with 5.0 ft wave heights and less than 10% rain probability, while Lisbon has relatively calm conditions with 11 kt winds. I expect the stronger winds in Mykonos to dominate the weather story in the Mediterranean today, with the Eastern Mediterranean bearing the brunt of the increased wind and wave activity.
